message.entry: Right hand side must be a column vector of length {0,number,integer} to match the coefficient matrix.
Right hand side must be a column vector.
Input tol may not be achievable by GMRES.\n Try to use a bigger tolerance.
Input tol is bigger than 1. \n Try to use a smaller tolerance.
RESTART is {0,number,integer} but it should be bounded by SIZE(A,1).\n Setting RESTART to {1,number,integer}.
MAXIT is {0,number,integer} but it should be bounded by SIZE(A,1).\n Setting MAXIT to {1,number,integer}.
Preconditioner must be a square matrix of size {0,number,integer} to match the problem size.
Preconditioner must be a square matrix of size {0,number,integer} to match the problem size.
Initial guess must be a column vector of length {0,number,integer} to match the problem size.
